title: System Design for Beginners (Full Guide)
summary: AWS Developers presents a seven-step framework for system design interviews: Requirements, traffic estimation, high-level components, API contracts, tech stack selection, and implementation constraints. The approach emphasizes understanding the problem before choosing technology, using a URL shortener as a concrete example.
writeup: This guide from AWS Developers lays out a framework for system design interviews, structured around steps including requirements gathering, traffic estimation, high-level components, API contracts, tech stack selection, and implementation constraints. The central principle: understand the problem before selecting any technology. A URL shortener serves as the concrete example that the framework is applied to throughout.
